evals.prompt: I want to build a WhatsApp customer support chatbot using Kuralle. Show me how to set up the webhook handler and wire it to an Kuralle agent.
evals.expected_output: A setup using @kuralle-agents/messaging + @kuralle-agents/messaging-meta. Should show createWhatsAppClient() with phone number ID + access token, createMessagingRouter() binding an Kuralle Runtime, webhook verification handler (GET), message handler (POST), and how to run the Hono/Express app. Should mention the 24h messaging window and that outside it you need templates.
expectations: Uses createWhatsAppClient() with phoneNumberId and accessToken
Uses createMessagingRouter() to bind the Kuralle runtime
Includes webhook GET handler for verification (hub.challenge response)
Includes webhook POST handler for incoming messages
Does NOT use graph.instagram.com for WhatsApp (that is Instagram-only)

evals.prompt: How do I set up a single Kuralle agent that handles both WhatsApp and Instagram DMs from the same webhook endpoint?
evals.expected_output: Shows createMessagingRouter() accepting an array of clients (WhatsApp + Instagram), mounted on a single POST route. Should mention the different URL patterns for each platform or use a combined router, note the Instagram-specific quirks (graph.instagram.com, HUMAN_AGENT tag for 24h window), and show that both platforms share the same Kuralle Runtime. Should also show webhook verification for both platforms if on separate routes.
expectations: Uses createMessagingRouter() with multiple platform clients
Shows how both platforms share the same Kuralle Runtime instance
Mentions HUMAN_AGENT tag requirement for Instagram 24h window re-open
Does not conflate WhatsApp template handling with Instagram (they differ)

evals.prompt: My WhatsApp bot works great within the first 24 hours but then users come back the next day and the bot fails silently. What's happening and how do I fix it?
evals.expected_output: Explanation of the Meta 24-hour messaging window: after 24h since the user's last message, you can only send pre-approved WhatsApp templates. Should show WindowClosedError handling, sendTextOrTemplate() as the safe utility that auto-falls-back to a template, and how to set up a template fallback. Should NOT suggest ignoring the error or just retrying the same message.
expectations: Correctly explains the 24-hour window — window resets on user message, NOT on agent message
Recommends sendTextOrTemplate() as the idiomatic solution
Shows how to configure a fallback template (templateName + templateLanguageCode)
Does NOT suggest silently dropping the message as a fix
Does NOT confuse WhatsApp 24h window with Instagram 24h window (they work differently)
